= 2... e4 - Reversed Krebs =
Of course black pushes further, forcing white to lose tempo and move the knight. White has a few responses to this:

=== White's responses: ===

# '''Nfd2 - 61%; winrate 48% (w) -  49% (b)'''
# '''Ne5 - 16%; winrate 45% -  53% - Reversed Mokele Mbembe'''
# '''Ng1 - 16%; winrate 49% -  48% - Reversed Brooklyn'''
